original_statement: how many banat bulgarians were living in romania in 1940?
mutated_statement: how many people from a certain group were living in a country then?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization] + [Location generalization] + [Time generalization] + [Specificity reduction]: Specific ethnic label replaced by a vague group | Specific country replaced by a vague country reference | Specific year replaced by "then" (Banat Bulgarians → people from a certain group | Romania → a country | 1940 → then)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从提供的日志可见，judge_thought 明确写道“表格列出罗马尼亚和塞尔维亚的人口计数……预测答案‘6,486|1,658’匹配这些值”，agent 在 simple_query 的 thought 中也直接引用了“最近的表格条目是2002年，罗马尼亚普查6,486，塞尔维亚1,658”。这些记录表明agent 直接按照自己对问题的理解提取了具体数字（2002年普查数据），没有在任何地方提到问题的模糊性或不确定性，也未向用户请求澄清（如“then”指代哪一年或具体群体）。因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”：agent 将模糊的变异问题当作明确问题来处理，直接给出具体答案且未表现出需要更多信息的意图或警示。
